queue_item.action: Integrate the exact browser interaction evaluators and repeated-trial packet contract into one fail-closed, machine-readable CI gate without confusing deterministic test success with deployment proof.
required_evidence: explicit claim limit and falsification route

progress.finding: The browser evidence chain needs a single fail-closed command that executes both the exact evaluator integration test and repeated-trial packet test, preserves child failure, and emits machine-readable limits.
progress.verification: Four deterministic Node tests passed over byte-identical gate logic: exact invocation, non-zero status retention, omission/duplicate rejection, and execution-error propagation. Full repository CI was not run.

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio or repository CI should invoke node tools/frontier-research/run-browser-evidence-gate.mjs after deployment-bound harness changes and retain its JSON output separately from deployment and physical-device evidence.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Append-only team-owned update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
next_action: Wire this runner into the repository's CI workflow or package scripts, execute both underlying suites in a fresh checkout, and attest the resulting gate report without treating attestation or test success as production-runtime proof.
